description: Register an Oracle Database resource for use by other components. Works against XE/Free/Enterprise, Autonomous Database, and OCI DBaaS.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Resource registration key. Other components reference it via this name.

port.label: Port
port.description: Listener port (default 1521 on-prem; 1522 for Autonomous DB)

service_name.label: Service Name
service_name.description: Oracle service name (e.g. 'FREEPDB1', 'ORCLCDB'). Either this OR sid is required.

thick_mode.label: Thick Mode
thick_mode.description: Use python-oracledb thick mode (requires Oracle Instant Client). Leave false for default thin-mode (pure Python).
